service.name: Google Docs
service.description: Google Docs — sub-service of google.com. Terms governed by parent Terms of Service.

api_access.conditions: Google Cloud APIs, Google Search API, Maps API, and many others available. API keys and OAuth required. Quotas apply per project.

scrape_data.conditions: Google Search results may not be scraped. Use Google Custom Search API. Google TOS prohibits automated access to services without explicit authorization.

allow_training.conditions: Google content and search results may not be used to train competing AI/ML models.
